summary: Frontend-only testing of the new interactive catalog editor on /app/catalog. Verified Prodotti tab default, include/exclude all, product search, per-row checkbox toggling, preview 'X' remove sync back to checkbox, tab switching, and Save POST to /api/catalogs. All 9 requested scenarios passed.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogCreate.jsx is 679 lines - consider splitting ProductPicker, CatalogPage, and ProductCard into separate files for maintainability.
excludeAll sets excludedIds = products.map(...); if products list changes later (dynamic), newly added products would be auto-included. Not a bug for current flow, just noting.
Drag & drop uses native HTML5 events and was not covered by automated testing (native drag events are unreliable in Playwright).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing 3 products (Prod Bulk 1, Prod Bulk 2, PW Test Product)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Catalog page is at /app/catalog (not /catalog). 3 products exist in DB. Verified via Playwright: tab-products default+active, counter 'N/M inclusi' updates, include-all/exclude-all buttons work, product-search filters DOM items (0 for no-match, all for prefix match), picker-check-{id} toggles inclusion and preview card presence in real time, preview-remove-{id} (visible only on hover with group/card class) removes card AND unchecks the corresponding checkbox, all 4 tabs switchable, Save POSTs correct payload (name, settings, product_ids) with 200. Drag & drop reordering was not automated-tested due to native HTML5 drag limitations in Playwright; recommend manual verification.
